zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy於1485年出生在法國時，他的父親Baudouin Delannoy51歲，母親Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy44歲。他於1509年與Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年9月12日在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lannoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: altered form of Flemish Van Oye or Van Hoye (or perhaps an Americanized form of any of their French variants, such as Vanoye, Vannoye, and Vanhoye), a habitational name for someone from a place called with Middle Dutch oye ‘(water) meadow’, as for example Hoye, near Ghent, Belgium. This form of the surname has apparently died out in France. Compare Van Hoy and Vanoy .

History: According to the family tradition, the ancestors of Vannoy family were Huguenots from France who first settled in the Netherlands and later moved to North America. However, their surname is not listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors, nor in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vanoy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Ancil, Cecile.
American or French: variant of   Vannoy  , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Van Hoy
meanings: American or French (also Vanhoy): variant of Vannoy , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is very rare in France (Nord).

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy was born in 1485, in France, his father, Baudouin Delannoy, was 51 and his mother, Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy, was 44. He married Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne in 1509. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 12 September 1543, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy est né en 1485, à France, son père, Baudouin Delannoy, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne en 1509. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 septembre 1543, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy 1485 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin Delannoy 51 und seine Mutter Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy 44. Er hat 1509 Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. September 1543 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy è nato il nel 1485 nel Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin Delannoy, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne nel 1509. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 settembre 1543, nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Philippe de Lannoyが1485年にフランスで生まれた時，父Baudouin Delannoyは51歳，母Michèle d’Esne de Cauroyは44歳であった。1509年にMarguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年9月12日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy(이)가 1485년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin Delannoy(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1509년 Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 9월 12일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy nasceu em 1485, em França, seu pai, Baudouin Delannoy, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne em 1509. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1543, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy родился в 1485 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin Delannoy было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne в 1509 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 сентября 1543 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy nació en 1485, en Francia, su papá, Baudouin Delannoy, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Marguerite Madeleine De Lannoy De Bourgogne en 1509. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1543, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, a la edad de 58 años.
